title: fragaria illinoensis
intro: Fragaria illinoensis, also known as Illinois wild strawberry, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fragaria illinoensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as salves and ointments, to support skin health and wound healing.
